title: Marysun Highland Cow Stuffed Animal Toy, Microwavable Highland Cow Gift for Girls and Kids
features: CUTE HIGHLAND COW DOLL：This Highland Cow plush toy has a very cute Highland cow appearance that matches the aesthetic of girls and kids, making it a unique and adorable gift for children, adults and all cow lovers

Relax: This microwaveable Highland cow plush toy is made from a soft and fluffy material that's perfect for cuddling. Enjoy the warmth by heating in the microwave at 600-800W for up to 90 seconds or in the microwave at 850-1,000W for up to 60 seconds

Flowing Hair: The long, flowing hair on the head of the Highland cow plush toy allows kids to create their own unique hairstyles. This adds a fun and creative element that makes it a one-of-a-kind Highland cow toy

A THOUGHTFUL GIFT: Plush toys always attract attention, and this Highland cow stuffed animal is an excellent choice for a birthday, Christmas, or holiday gift. It’s a delightful gift for children or girlfriends, bringing them warmth, comfort and relaxation

UNIQUE DECORATION：This Highland cow plush is compact in size, measuring 8.50 × 5.04 × 4.33 inches, making it a unique decoration for any room. Its small size allows it to be placed anywhere as a charming Highland cow decor piece
description: Directions Heat in the microwave at 600-800W for up to 90 seconds or at 850-1,000W for up to 60 seconds for warmth.
